description: Sector overlay for French law firms, lawyers, legal-services providers, client-care documents, legal professional confidentiality, AML/CFT, and professional-ethics controls.

metadata.scope: France-only sector overlay controls for Law and Legal. Intended to be used with france_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official French/EU legal, regulatory, supervisory, and guidance sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.issuer: Conseil national des barreaux / Ordres d'avocats

rules.title: Client confidentiality and professional secrecy evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for secret professionnel, client confidentiality, privileged correspondence, legal professional secrecy, or file confidentiality evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: RIN CNB professional secrecy and confidentiality provisions

rules.title: Conflict-of-interest controls are evidenced
rules.summary: Checks for conflict checks, independence, client acceptance, adverse interests, or engagement governance evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Legal-profession AML/CFT route is evidenced where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for client due diligence, beneficial owner, transaction vigilance, suspicious reporting, or TRACFIN route evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Client engagement, fee, or complaints information is present
rules.summary: Checks for engagement letter, fee agreement, billing terms, complaints, mediation, or client information evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: RIN CNB client-care and fee provisions
